title: Lew's Harderite
description: New items, New sets and Battle axes
body:
Here are the New challenging ingots and sets: 
Enderite and Wardenite (these ingots are difficult to make and are stronger than the Netherite ingot) 

This mod adds new challenging ingots to the game, as well as battle axes, allowing you to cut down creatures faster and easier.

Netherite -> Enderite
- Enderite is a relic found in the end. When you melt this relic and combine it with diamonds, you will get new items stronger than Netherite. Of course, you must have the Enderite Upgrade for this.

Enderite -> Wardenite
- Wardenite is a new and powerful ingot that you can obtain by combining the Enderite Ingot with a piece that you can obtain by killing the Warden, the powerful creature guarding the ancient city. If you can achieve this, you can turn your Enderite Armor and items into Wardenite Items with the Wardenite Upgrade that you can find in the ancient city (The harder the better).
